LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.description: Create Whitespring megaturrets: Kontarion, Onager and Palintone, as well as their ammunition.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.label: Defensas de Whitespring
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.description: Craft powerful Whitespring mortar shells, such as shrapnel, armor piercing and cluster.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.label: Soluciones de guerra de Whitespring
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteDemolition.label: Whitespring war solutions
LanguageData.VFEE_JanissaryGear.description: Craft heavy trooper armor, light powered armor that’s commonly used by Whitespring recon troops. Note that these also require advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.description: Construya decoración presidencial como alfombras, espejos, grandes sillones, losas Whitespring, candelabros y más de Whitespring.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.label: decoración presidencial
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.description: Construya una silla de escritorio presidencial adecuada para altos funcionarios de Whitespring y sus deberes ceremoniales.
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.label: silla de escritorio presidencial
